reasoning: Both models failed to review PKGBUILD (critical build script) due to false binary file detection, preventing analysis of build/install behavior.
coverage_issues: Potential .install hooks or referenced scripts not examined
false_negatives: PKGBUILD risks: Potential unsafe commands (curl, install, make) not analyzed
Possible post-install scripts or network access during build missed
learnings: Override binary detection for critical files (PKGBUILD/.install)
Prioritize PKGBUILD as mandatory first review target
Improve text encoding handling to prevent false binary classification
Add fallback mechanism when PKGBUILD fails initial audit
